## Plugin concept

What should this plugin do?

## Use case

Who benefits from this? What workflow does it enable?

## API needs

Which Plugin Context APIs would it use? (chat, terminal, webhook, scheduler, events)

## Willing to build it?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to implement this
- [ ] No, just an idea for others
